title: versioning — kill switches + rollout controls
description: Pennant flags. Kill switches default ON.

flags.description: Master resolver kill switch. When off, every request resolves to config('versioning.default') without walking the chain. Emergency toggle for a bad resolver.
Disable URL-path resolver. Requests must use header/query then.
Enable query-param resolver in production (default off; on in dev/test/staging via env). Turning on in production requires the versioning.query_resolver_in_production feature entitlement.
Disable webhook subscription pinning. All webhook payloads deliver as platform-current — backwards-incompatible for pinned subscribers.
Disable GraphQL context resolver. GraphQL surface defaults to platform-current schema.
Disable payload transformer chain composition. Direct edges still resolve; multi-hop chains skipped (delivery fails with NO_TRANSFORMER_PATH).
When off, sunset versions serve responses (with Sunset header) instead of returning 410. Emergency toggle if a customer's business-critical integration is caught by a sunset.
Enable the AutoUpgradePinnedSubscriptions listener. Off = pinned subs paused instead of upgraded.
